adventure.title: Panda Adventure
adventure.subtitle: Panda Adventure Challenge
adventure.description: Learn Chinese through exciting mini-games! Battle, puzzle, quiz, and maze — all designed to make your Chinese learning journey an adventure.
adventure.hero.title: Panda Adventure
adventure.hero.description: Learning Chinese isn't just textbooks! Through four mini-games — battle, puzzle, quiz, and maze — reinforce vocabulary, practice grammar, and improve reaction speed. With each level you complete, your panda grows stronger, and so do you.

adventure.minigames.subtitle: Adventure through learning
adventure.allCompleteDesc: You've conquered every challenge! You are the Panda Master!
